name: Referral - Sequence Stop (Reply Detection)
description: Stops active sequences when a prospect replies to any email. Creates follow-up task and notifies Elliott.

steps.notes: This stops all active workflows that check for sequence-active tag

steps.task_title: Reply received from {{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}} - follow up manually
steps.task_body: Referral prospect {{contact.first_name}} at {{contact.company_name}} replied to outreach email. Follow up within 24 hours. Check their reply in Conversations.

steps.message: Referral prospect {{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}} ({{contact.company_name}}) replied to your outreach email. Check GHL Conversations to follow up.

steps.notes: Move contact to qualifying stage for manual follow-up
